summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Governance Engine - backend fully functional, frontend has modal overlay issue preventing form submissions

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts clicks preventing form submission buttons from working
ui_bugs.details: Dialog overlay div with class 'fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/80' blocks pointer events to form submit buttons

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console for DialogContent

passed_tests: Client CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete)
AI System CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete)
Dashboard page loads with stats cards
Navigation between all pages (Clients, AI Systems, New Assessment, History)
UI elements present with correct data-testid attributes
Empty state handling for all pages
Search and filter controls on History page

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (UI loads and navigates correctly, form submission blocked by overlay issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay z-index issue in Dialog components that prevents form submission buttons from being clickable. This affects client creation, AI system creation, and potentially assessment wizard. The overlay div needs to not block pointer events to form buttons or the click handling needs to be adjusted.
